summary: Created PRD workspace and captured original user request.
Captured product intent, users, objectives, scope, constraints, and source facts from required inputs.
Derived UR/BR/QA/DI requirements, acceptance criteria, risks, assumptions, decisions, and traceability links.
Wrote final PRD and traceability matrix from requirements contract without code edits.
Validated constraints: benchmark-only, no output patching, no generic healing, strict validators, deterministic Phase 3 retrieval, product-focused PRD.
Stored final PRD, traceability matrix, eval findings, phase state, and minimal durable traces.
